tasks.subject: Task 1: Theme-based random name pools
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure module that hands out a random, theme-appropriate, not-already-used character name.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/game-engine/names.ts`
- Test: `src/__tests__/names.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Every GameTheme has a non-empty, duplicate-free name pool.
- pickRandomName never returns a name already in the taken set.
- pickRandomName falls back to "Character N" once a theme's pool is exhausted.

**Verify:** `node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/names.test.ts`

See full task detail (code included) in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-make-playable.md, Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-engine/names.ts", "src/__tests__/names.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/names.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Every GameTheme has a non-empty, duplicate-free name pool", "pickRandomName never returns a name already in the taken set", "pickRandomName falls back to Character N once a theme's pool is exhausted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Random character generation (planNewCharacters)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure function that drafts theme-legal, balance-aware random characters to fill empty deck slots.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/game-engine/randomize.ts` (planNewCharacters + shared helpers)
- Modify: `src/types/game.ts` — add CharacterDraft
- Test: `src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Returns [] when deck already has 24 characters.
- Returns exactly 24 - characters.length drafts otherwise.
- Every draft has all 11 GAMEPLAY_TRAITS defined.
- outfitType/accessory always theme-legal.
- No draft reuses an existing displayName.
- Drafts have referenceImageUrls: [] and no personId.

**Verify:** `node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts`

See full task detail (code included) in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-make-playable.md, Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-engine/randomize.ts", "src/types/game.ts", "src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns [] when deck already has 24 characters", "Returns exactly 24-N drafts otherwise", "Every draft has all GAMEPLAY_TRAITS defined", "outfitType/accessory theme-legal", "No draft reuses existing displayName"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Duplicate resolution (resolveDuplicates)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve critical-similarity pairs among combined (existing + drafted) 24 characters by mutating only accessory/hat/glasses/outfitType/topColor, preferring drafted characters as mutation target, reporting unresolved collisions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/game-engine/randomize.ts` (append resolveDuplicates)
- Modify: `src/types/game.ts` — add CharacterEdit
- Test: `src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts` (append)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Two identical existing characters resolved via MUTABLE_TRAITS-only edits.
- facialHair/hair/eyeColor/expression never changed.
- Draft preferred as mutation target when pair includes both.
- No-collision deck produces no edits/unresolved.

**Verify:** `node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts`

See full task detail (code included) in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-make-playable.md, Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-engine/randomize.ts", "src/types/game.ts", "src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Identical existing chars resolved via mutable-trait-only edits", "facialHair/hair/eyeColor/expression never changed", "Draft preferred as mutation target", "No-collision deck untouched"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Combine into planMakePlayable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single entry point that drafts fill-ins, resolves collisions across the projected full 24, and reports whether the result would be playable.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/game-engine/randomize.ts` (append planMakePlayable)
- Modify: `src/types/game.ts` — add MakePlayablePlan
- Test: `src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts` (append)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- newCharacters.length + characters.length === 24 after planning.
- willBePlayable is boolean reflecting evaluateDeck() on projected final 24.
- Deck already at 24 with no edits needed returns newCharacters: [].
- Deliberately duplicated deck produces at least one edit.

**Verify:** `node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts` then full suite `node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js`

See full task detail (code included) in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-make-playable.md, Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-engine/randomize.ts", "src/types/game.ts", "src/__tests__/randomize.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["newCharacters.length + characters.length === 24", "willBePlayable is boolean from evaluateDeck", "Deck at 24 with no edits returns empty newCharacters", "Duplicated deck produces edits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Text-only image generation for photo-less characters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Let /api/characters/[id]/generate and GeminiImageProvider produce an image for a character with no reference photo, via a text-only prompt with forced attribute overrides.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/image-generation/GeminiImageProvider.ts:11-53`
- Modify: `src/app/api/characters/[id]/generate/route.ts:71-77`
- Modify: `src/lib/game-engine/prompts.ts:201-327` (generateImagePrompt)
- Test: `src/__tests__/GeminiImageProvider.test.ts` (new)
- Test: `src/__tests__/prompts.test.ts` (append)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- generateImage(prompt, []) no longer throws; sends only text part.
- generateImage(prompt, [url]) behavior unchanged.
- Generate API route no longer 400s on no reference photos.
- generateImagePrompt forces physical overrides + omits "attached photo" line when no photo.
- generateImagePrompt unchanged when photo present.

**Verify:** `node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/__tests__/GeminiImageProvider.test.ts src/__tests__/prompts.test.ts` then full suite.

See full task detail (code included) in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-make-playable.md, Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/image-generation/GeminiImageProvider.ts", "src/app/api/characters/[id]/generate/route.ts", "src/lib/game-engine/prompts.ts", "src/__tests__/GeminiImageProvider.test.ts", "src/__tests__/prompts.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generateImage([]) does not throw, sends text-only part", "generateImage with photo unchanged", "route no longer 400s on empty referenceImageUrls", "prompt forces overrides and omits attached-photo line when no photo"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: MakePlayableModal component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A preview modal that renders a MakePlayablePlan and lets the user confirm or cancel.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/game-sets/MakePlayableModal.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Headline reflects plan.willBePlayable and plan.unresolved.length.
- Lists every drafted new character with name + non-"none" attribute values.
- Lists every edit with trait: from -> to per change, grouped by character.
- Lists unresolved warnings when present.
- Confirm/Cancel call onConfirm/onCancel; disabled while isApplying.

**Verify:** No automated test (no component test harness in this codebase). `npx tsc --noEmit` for typecheck; visual check in Task 7.

See full task detail (code included) in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-make-playable.md, Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/game-sets/MakePlayableModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Headline reflects willBePlayable/unresolved count", "Lists new characters with attribute chips", "Lists edits with from->to", "Lists unresolved warnings", "Confirm/Cancel wired and disabled while applying"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wire Make Playable into game set editor page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the "Make Playable" button, plan state, and confirm handler to src/app/game-sets/[id]/page.tsx, persisting the plan and generating images for new characters.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/game-sets/[id]/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Button appears in header row only when isPlayable === false.
- Clicking computes and shows MakePlayableModal with current plan.
- Cancel closes modal with no side effects.
- Confirm creates new characters, applies edits, runs generation loop for new characters, re-evaluates and saves balance report, closes modal.

**Verify:** Manual — `npm run dev`, open a game set with <24 characters, click Make Playable, verify preview, confirm, verify grid reaches 24 and balance badge updates. Then full test suite `node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js`.

See full task detail (code included) in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-make-playable.md, Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/game-sets/[id]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "node node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Button shown only when not playable", "Modal opens with correct plan", "Cancel is a no-op", "Confirm persists new chars + edits + runs generation + updates balance"]}
```
